metadata.author: The Canons of the Council in Trullo; Often Called The Quinisext Council

title: Canon X.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: A bishop, or presbyter, or deacon who receives usury, or what is called hecatostæ, let him desist or be deposed.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: A bishop, presbyter, or deacon who takes usury shall be deposed unless he stops doing so.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: See notes on canon XVI. of Nice, and the Excursus thereto appended.
